steps.title: Identify the series
steps.content: The sentence lists three things botanical gardens are dedicated to: growing diverse plant species, fostering scientific research, and educating the public. The phrase “both native and nonnative” simply describes the plant species, so commas should set it off inside the first list item.

steps.title: Match the semicolon pattern
steps.content: The sentence already uses a semicolon before the third list item, “and educating the public.” To keep the list parallel, the first item should also end with a semicolon after “nonnative.” Choice A uses only commas, Choice C puts the semicolon before the descriptive phrase, and Choice D fails to set off the descriptor. The answer is B.
